salesforce.note: CRM — opportunity stage, renewal date, contract value, contacts

salesforce_cpq.note: CPQ — quote history, pricing rules, discount approvals

docusign.note: Contract storage — executed agreements, addenda, order forms

g2.note: Review platform — buyer intent signals, expansion opportunity indicators, competitive win/loss context at renewal
